message:
feat: Add bookmarks and export functionality with expanded public API

Introduces two new feature modules and expands the library's public API
surface for better integration and extensibility:

Bookmarks (bookmarks.rs):
- Persistent bookmark storage for favorite conversations
- Tag support for organizing bookmarks into collections
- Quick-access list sorted by most recently bookmarked
- Integration with TUI for one-key bookmark toggling (B key)
- JSON-based storage in user data directory

Export (export.rs):
- Multiple export formats: JSON, Markdown, Plain Text
- Conversation serialization with full message history
- Configurable metadata inclusion levels
- Batch export support for multiple conversations
- Stream-friendly output for large conversations

Library Exports (lib.rs):
- Public re-exports of core types for downstream consumers
- Feature-gated exports for optional dependencies
- Improved module organization following Rust 2021 idioms
- Documentation comments for public API items

These additions enable users to save important conversations
for later reference and share them in standard formats
suitable for documentation, archival, or import into
other tools.
